name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ConfigureBulletsHelper.ImpulseRecovery
summary: Recovery rate of impulse strength per second (impulse strength from 0.0:1.0).  At 60fps a impulseRecovery=60.0 will recover in 1 frame.
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 60.0f.
